name: MoneyGram
description_short: San Antonio, TX MoneyGram at 919 Wurzbach Pkwy offers check cashing and money transfer services 7 days a week.
description_long:
The MoneyGram location at 919 Wurzbach Parkway in San Antonio, Texas operates as a standalone check-cashing and money transfer center. Open 7 days a week from 7AM to 10PM daily, this San Antonio branch provides convenient access to cash advances and international money transfer services for residents and visitors in the Wurzbach corridor area.

At this San Antonio MoneyGram location, you can cash checks, send money transfers internationally, pay bills, and access other financial services. The staff provides assistance during extended hours to residents of San Antonio and surrounding areas. For specific details about services or current rates, call +1 800-746-7287.

Bring a valid government-issued ID when visiting this Wurzbach Parkway location in San Antonio, TX. The extended 7AM-10PM schedule makes it convenient for early morning or evening financial transactions. MoneyGram's competitive rates and straightforward processes make it a practical choice for San Antonio residents needing quick check cashing or money transfer services.
pros: Operates a widespread network of physical locations enabling in-person transactions
Offers both online and offline transfer options for customer flexibility
Provides location search functionality by address, city, state, and ZIP code for easy accessibility
Enables both domestic and international money transfers
User-friendly website interface with clear navigation for locating nearby agents
cons: Location search returned zero results for San Antonio despite being a major city, suggesting limited availability or technical issues
Website content provided does not disclose specific fees, exchange rates, or transfer speed timeframes
No information available on customer support, dispute resolution, or service guarantees
best_for: Customers needing to send money to family or contacts internationally with established agent networks in destination countries
Unbanked or underbanked individuals preferring in-person transaction options without digital banking requirements
Consumers seeking immediate cash pickup options for received money transfers
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best suited for unbanked consumers and those needing reliable international money transfer services through established physical locations. The primary caveat is that service availability appears limited in some areas (as evidenced by zero San Antonio results), and the website does not clearly disclose pricing, fees, or competitive transfer rates needed to assess full value.
services: In-person transfer services at physical locations
meta_description: MoneyGram at 919 Wurzbach Pkwy, San Antonio, TX. Check cashing and money transfers available 7AM-10PM.
